issues.title: Dashboard read authentication
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Problem:** Dashboard on `:8787` exposed live metrics and reports without login.

**Shipped:** All `/api/*` require authenticated session; username/password + optional TOTP 2FA.

issues.title: Auth credentials clarity
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Problem:** Auth model unclear; legacy token did not lock reads.

**Shipped:** INSTALL + Help document login, forced password change, 2FA, operator reset; legacy `dashboardAuthToken` deprecated.

issues.title: Default admin account + forced password change
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** Default `watchtower` user + random password logged once; forced password change on first login.

issues.title: Username/password login + session
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** Session cookie after login; all dashboard routes protected.

issues.title: Exposure warning + first-login onboarding
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** Banner when dashboard bound to `0.0.0.0`; onboarding tour + security checklist.

issues.title: Upgrade migration + credential reveal
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** One-time credential reveal in log on upgrade path; migration from legacy token.

issues.title: Optional TOTP 2FA
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** TOTP in Help → Security; recovery codes.

issues.title: Operator password reset
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** `/watchtower dashboard reset-password` (OP 4); file-based recovery documented.

issues.title: Credential storage at rest
issues.body:
**Status:** shipped **1.0.0**

**Shipped:** PBKDF2 password hashes; encrypted TOTP secrets in `dashboard-auth.json`.
